case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NORMA CARMONA PEREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NORMA CARMONA PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.77 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, NORMA CARMONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHTOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
